title: Ultimate Evangelion Addon
description: Adding high-quality Evangelion content to Minecraft.
body:
### ![Shinji armor And spear of longinus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6584519ffa299e1406a4273ad772c1648f6ddfe7.png)**_Evangelion Ultimate Addon_**

# THE SPEARS IN THE PICTURES ARE FROM THIS MOD 

https://modrinth.com/mod/spears-of-longinus

If you want to use their spears with my armor and structures, download both mods!



The Evangelion Ultimate Addon is a high-performance content expansion for Minecraft that meticulously recreates the "Neon Genesis Evangelion" universe. Developed using MCreator and optimized for Forge and NeoForge, this mod focuses on delivering a high-fidelity experience with custom-engineered entities and combat systems.


## Current Features

**Evangelion Units (EVAs)**: Features detailed 3D models of EVAs, including the Eva-01, built with high-resolution textures.

**The Angels**: Includes a roster of formidable Angels designed to scale, providing massive boss-style encounters within the Minecraft world.

**Plugsuits**: Fully functional and wearable Plugsuits for pilots, designed with accurate aesthetics from the anime series.

**Native Animation System**: All entities and Evas utilize integrated Blockbench animations, ensuring smooth movement and cinematic combat without requiring external libraries like GeckoLib.

**Atmospheric Engineering**: Built-in compatibility for world height extensions up to 1,024 blocks, allowing the massive Evas and Angels to fight at their true scale.

# Future Development & Roadmap

**Mega-Structure Construction**: Detailed planning is underway for the implementation of massive-scale structures and environmental builds to recreate iconic series locations.

**Advanced Combat Mechanics**: Development of specific abilities for Evas and unique attack patterns for each Angel.

**Geofront Integration**: Future updates aim to introduce custom world generation to house NERV operations and specialized biomes.

**Synchronization Systems**: Researching ways to implement pilot-to-Eva sync ratios and energy management (Internal Battery/Umbilical Cable) for a more authentic simulation.

**Cross-Platform Support**: Ongoing work to provide stable ports for multiple versions, including Fabric and the latest NeoForge releases, ensuring the addon reaches the entire Minecraft community.

Special thanks to Smod and higinho23 for the models and textures of items like the Spear of Longinus and upcoming models for Evas and Angels, and textures take inspiration of kobrakomr mod for minecraft bedrock.



**Smod**: https://www.planetminecraft.com/mod/evangelion-end-addon-v1/

**higinho23**: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/new-genesis-evancraft

**kobrakomr**: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft-bedrock/texture-packs/minecraft-evangelion-version-3-the-rebuild-edition

https://modrinth.com/mod/spears-of-longinus
